message:
test(expire): add i64::MAX boundary precision tests for expiry evaluation

Add two tests that exercise the exact boundary where (deadline - now_ms)
equals or exceeds i64::MAX:

- subtraction_can_land_exactly_on_i64_max_boundary: verifies that when
  the delta is exactly i64::MAX the result is correctly clamped without
  off-by-one error
- subtraction_above_i64_max_boundary_clamps: verifies that delta =
  i64::MAX + 1 still clamps to i64::MAX rather than wrapping

These complement the existing far_future_deadline_clamps_to_i64_max
test with more precise boundary coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
